segments.nethackrc:
OPTIONS=name:robin,role:Rogue,race:human,gender:male,align:chaotic
OPTIONS=!autopickup
OPTIONS=suppress_alert:3.4.3
OPTIONS=symset:DECgraphics
OPTIONS=disclose:yi ya yv yg yc yo

steps.screen:
[23CIt is written in the Book of Kos:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[27CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[27Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[27Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[27CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[23CYour god Kos seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[23Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[23CYou, a newly trained Footpad, have been heralded
[23Cfrom birth as the instrument of Kos.  You are destined
[23Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[23Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[23Cof us all:  Go bravely with Kos!
[23C--More--




Robin the Footpad[14CSt:11 Dx:18 Co:11 In:12 Wi:11 Ch:12 Chaotic
Dlvl:1 $:0 HP:12(12) Pw:2(2) AC:0 Xp:1

Hello robin, welcome to NetHack!  You are a chaotic male human Rogue.--More--
